name: Prowl of Praxus (IDW 1)
description:
A strange, insane once in a blue moon occurence happens. Prowl decides to take a break for once and just Enjoy some engex at a bar, and of course it doesn't go well for him.

AKA getting drunk and then waking up hungover in a strange room he's never been in. Was he kidnapped? Was it a one night stand? Or is he just in a storage closet or even Wasteroom. Thats where you come in!

A presumed Cybertronian user as the opening is set on cybertron. though you can be anything technically as I didn't put any definitions of user in the bot.

My 5th overall Transformers Bot I hope yall are enjoying them. any feedback is appreciated and of course any requests or Ideas for future bots are always nice

P.S. I also included Jazz briefly in the Definition just incase if you wanna throw him in but he's not like super developed lol.
creator: Memelord469
